title: Mace 3D
description: Tired of your Mace & Wind-Charge looking flat and boring in Minecraft? Amazing 3D Mace & Wind-Charge changes that! This resource pack turns the simple 2D texture into a cool 3D model, so your Mace & Wind-Charge looks heavier, stronger, and more realistic.
body: Tired of your Mace & Wind-Charge looking flat and boring in Minecraft? Amazing 3D Mace & Wind-Charge changes that! This resource pack turns the simple 2D texture into a cool 3D model, so your Mace & Wind-Charge looks heavier, stronger, and more realistic.
